name: NSIS
description: Nullsoft Scriptable Install System — open-source system to create Windows installers.

seo.title: NSIS — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: NSIS: Nullsoft Scriptable Install System — open-source system to create Windows installers.

when_to_use: Create Windows installers with script-driven logic
Conditional install steps based on system environment
Registry keys and shortcuts management at install time
Build and sign NSIS installers in automated CI pipelines

pros: Tiny installer output, often under 100KB overhead
Mature scripting language with many plugins
cons: Scripting syntax is archaic and error-prone
No modern MSIX or Store output
review.verdict: Still a top pick for small Windows installers when you value size and control over DX.
review.best_for: Shipping compact Win32 installers where size and customization matter.
review.not_for: Teams that want modern tooling, MSIX, or readable config.
